name: Forrester Bonded Leather Square Storage Ottoman Espresso - Christopher Knight Home: Upholstered with Hidden Compartment
description: Designed with exquisite taste in mind, you will appreciate every inch of this Christopher Knight Home Forrester Bonded Leather Square Storage Ottoman. With elegant stitching on the lid, you will get not only a modern and upscale look, but a softness that makes this ottoman perfect as an extra seat. The large surface area also allows you to use it as a coffee table or as a place for you to rest your weary feet. Perhaps the best feature of this ottoman is the hidden storage compartment.
